changelog: Added 4 new built-in skills (reverse-engineering, protocol-analysis, crypto-analysis, firmware-re)
Added web-app-security skill for comprehensive web vulnerability analysis
Added 'Select All' / 'Deselect All' buttons to Skills, MCP, and Profiles tabs
Fixed Qt 6 compatibility issues in bulk renamer (CheckState.value, disconnect)
Enhanced token tracking - now accumulates usage from all LLM calls
Added session token usage persistence to config
Improved skills organization with better categorization
Added mathematical precision mode for crypto-analysis profile
Enhanced protocol analysis with state machine extraction
Added firmware binary blob analysis capabilities
Total: 32 built-in skills + 9 external = 41 total skills available
